Interface ISupporterErrorSupplier

public interface ISupporterErrorSupplier
Provides error messages for the SupporterMiddleware.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getAutoCompleteError()
    Returns the error message for auto-complete interactions.

    Returns the error message for command interactions.
